reason_for_handoff: Current hardware is a 4-core i5-3570K with no usable GPU; a full 3-stage CPU-only curriculum retrain takes 30-45 minutes even at the smallest real profile. Next step needs a much larger English corpus and probably a larger model, which needs faster hardware.

hardware_this_was_built_on.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GT 710, 1GB VRAM, CUDA unavailable

current_checkpoints.note: These are POST both bugfixes (JSON leakage + template-repetition leakage). Older checkpoints are preserved in pre_fix_backup/ and pre_template_fix_backup/ subdirectories, do not delete without explicit user permission.

English.note: BOTTLENECK - needs to grow by 10x+ before next training pass, see HANDOFF.md

known_bugs_fixed_this_session.description: bootstrap_data.py used json.dumps(observation) as training text; model leaked raw JSON syntax into all generations.
Fix for json_leakage used exactly one fixed English sentence template per slot; model over-fit to those exact phrases instead, leaking fragments like 'Reachable adjoining room' into all generations.
known_bugs_fixed_this_session.fix_location: src/virtual_person/bootstrap_data.py: _ROOM_TEMPLATES, _NEIGHBOR_TEMPLATES, _DRIVE_INTRO_TEMPLATES, _VISIBLE_TEMPLATES, _CANDIDATE_TEMPLATES (multiple phrasings, randomly selected per record)
known_bugs_fixed_this_session.result_after_fix: No longer locks onto ONE phrase, but generated text is still ungrammatical word-salad recombining fragments from the several templates. Likely a capacity/data-scale ceiling, not a remaining formatting bug. See HANDOFF.md 'The result after both fixes' section.

recommended_next_steps_in_priority_order: Grow the English corpus by roughly 10x (thousands of records of real natural prose, not more Behavior template variants) before any further training.

Only after corpus growth: move up to 'Small GPU experiment' profile (192 hidden, 4 layers) per trainer_support.py MODEL_PROFILES, following the project's own scaling policy (verify throughput/memory before committing).
Do not patch bootstrap_data.py phrasing further; diminishing returns already reached after two rounds.

features_built_this_session_all_tested_w.name: shop_app
features_built_this_session_all_tested_w.note: No substance/drug purchases - explicitly excluded by user.

features_built_this_session_all_tested_w.name: qemu_vm_integration
features_built_this_session_all_tested_w.note: Implements existing SensorSuite/ActuatorSuite ABCs from real_world.py, verified through RealWorldRuntime's safety gating directly.

vm_state_at_handoff.user_was_doing: Interactive OOBE setup ('getting ready...') in a visible QEMU SDL window
next_steps_once_desktop_reached: Confirm QEMU process is still alive and check if Windows finished booting.
For subsequent boots, drop -cdrom Windows.iso -boot d (installer-only flags) - just boot windows10.qcow2 directly.
Hand the running VM to QemuSensors/QemuActuators per the pattern already verified working in this session (see test_vm_runtime.py and vm_runtime.py).

hard_constraints_do_not_violate: No custom internet-facing network protocols - explicitly refused earlier in session, use vetted tools (Tailscale/SSH) if remote access is ever needed.
No substance/drug purchase mechanics in the economy/shop system - explicitly scoped out by user.
Do not delete pre_fix_backup/ or pre_template_fix_backup/ checkpoints without explicit user permission.
Do not scale model/corpus size up without measuring throughput first, per project's own TRAINING_GUIDE.md scaling policy.
Never judge a checkpoint from one generation sample - always use mind_training/eval_suite.json + run_eval_suite.py.
